flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Missouri Western State University rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.4k → $20.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at Missouri Western State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.4k vs 3.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Missouri Western State University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 2.2k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Missouri Western State University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (60.2% → 53.8%).
